@@ -2058,0 +2058,9 @@
+JNI_ENTRY_CHECKED(jboolean,
+  checked_jni_IsValueObject(JNIEnv *env,
+                            jobject obj))
+    functionEnter(thr);
+    jboolean result = UNCHECKED()->IsValueObject(env, obj);
+    functionExit(thr);
+    return result;
+JNI_END
+

+#include <jni.h>
+
+JNIEXPORT jboolean JNICALL
+Java_runtime_valhalla_inlinetypes_TestJNIIsValueObject_isValueObject(JNIEnv* env, jclass klass, jobject target) {
+  return (*env)->IsValueObject(env, target);
+}
